summary: Iteration 8 testing for Phase 1 Smart Filters & Dataset Builder completed successfully. All 12 backend tests pass. Frontend Config page shows Smart Filters section with Phase 1 badge, all 9 filter inputs, and Trend Alignment toggle. Dataset stats endpoint returns signal logging data with rejection reasons. Bot filters endpoint returns current filter configuration and cooldown state.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_phase1_smart_filters.py - Created comprehensive test suite for Phase 1 Smart Filters

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Smart Filters section, Phase 1 badge, all inputs, save functionality working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Smart Filters fully implemented and tested. Backend: GET /api/dataset/stats returns total_signals, trades_taken, trades_rejected, outcomes, rejection_reasons, avg_confidence. GET /api/bot/filters returns filter config and cooldown state. PUT /api/bot/config accepts all 9 smart filter fields. Positions include confidence_score and filters_passed fields. Frontend: Config page has Smart Filters section with Phase 1 badge, 9 input fields, and Trend Alignment toggle. Signal dataset has 60 signals logged with rejection reasons tracked.

positions_confidence_score.note: Only positions created after Phase 1 have these fields

mocked_api_note: Bot runs in DRY mode. Smart filters use simulated spread/slippage/liquidity data in DRY mode. No real trades executed.
